items.name: Loaded Potato Skins
items.description: Crispy skins loaded with melted cheddar, bacon, and green onions. Served with sour cream.

items.name: Mozzarella Sticks
items.description: Golden fried and served with our tangy marinara sauce.

items.name: Classic Buffalo Wings
items.description: Tossed in fiery Buffalo sauce and served with celery and blue cheese dressing.

items.name: The Hometown Classic Burger
items.description: A juicy 100% beef patty topped with American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles.

items.name: Whiskey-Glazed Bacon Burger
items.description: Signature whiskey-glaze, bacon, cheddar, lettuce, tomato, and onion.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
items.description: Golden fried chicken breast, pickles, and mayo on a toasted bun.

items.name: Full Rack Baby Back Ribs
items.description: Slow-cooked, fall-off-the-bone tender baby back pork ribs basted in tangy BBQ sauce.

items.name: Center-Cut Sirloin
items.description: 8 oz. seasoned sirloin steak fire-grilled to perfection. Served with mashed potatoes.

items.name: Brownie Obsession
items.description: A warm brownie covered in chocolate fudge, vanilla ice cream, caramel sauce and pecans.

items.name: NY Style Cheesecake
items.description: Classic creamy cheesecake topped with fresh strawberry puree.
